memberdef.argsstring: (uint_least8_t *dst, ptrdiff_t dstbit, const uint_least8_t *src, ptrdiff_t srcbit, size_t n)
memberdef.name: bcpybe

briefdescription.para: Copies n bits from a source to a destination buffer.

detaileddescription.para: The buffers MUST NOT overlap. This function assumes a big-endian bit ordering (i.e., bit 0 is the most significant bit). On platforms where CHAR_BIT != 8, only the 8 least significant bits of each byte are copied.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to the destination buffer.
the destination offset (in bits) with respect to dst.
a pointer to the source buffer.
the source offset (in bits) with respect to src.
the number of bits to copy.

memberdef.argsstring: (uint_least8_t *dst, ptrdiff_t dstbit, const uint_least8_t *src, ptrdiff_t srcbit, size_t n)
memberdef.name: bcpyle

briefdescription.para: Copies n bits from a source to a destination buffer.

detaileddescription.para: The buffers MUST NOT overlap. This function assumes a little-endian bit ordering (i.e., bit 0 is the least significant bit). On platforms where CHAR_BIT != 8, only the 8 least significant bits of each byte are copied.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to the destination buffer.
the destination offset (in bits) with respect to dst.
a pointer to the source buffer.
the source offset (in bits) with respect to src.
the number of bits to copy.

briefdescription.para: This file is part of the utilities library; it contains the implementation of the byte order functions.

detaileddescription.para:
